description: Total population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total population raster

description: Total female population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum across all female age-band rasters

description: Total male population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum across all male age-band rasters

description: Population aged under 5 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 00 and 01

description: Population aged 5-14 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 05 and 10

description: Population aged 15-24 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 15 and 20

description: Population aged 15-64 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total 5-year age bands from 15 to 60

description: Population aged 65 years and older within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total 5-year age bands from 65 to 90

description: Female population aged 15-49 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of female 5-year age bands from 15 to 45

description: Mean relative wealth index value within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Mean of RWI points inside the administrative boundary

description: Population-weighted mean relative wealth index value within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Mean RWI weighted by 1km population cells assigned to nearest RWI point
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Population in the lowest national population-weighted RWI quintile within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Sum of 1km population cells assigned to national RWI quintile 1; filtered cells are imputed using admin raw_rwi
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Population in national population-weighted RWI quintile 2 within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Sum of 1km population cells assigned to national RWI quintile 2; filtered cells are imputed using admin raw_rwi
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Population in national population-weighted RWI quintile 3 within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Sum of 1km population cells assigned to national RWI quintile 3; filtered cells are imputed using admin raw_rwi
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Population in national population-weighted RWI quintile 4 within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Sum of 1km population cells assigned to national RWI quintile 4; filtered cells are imputed using admin raw_rwi
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Population in the highest national population-weighted RWI quintile within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Sum of 1km population cells assigned to national RWI quintile 5; filtered cells are imputed using admin raw_rwi
source_notes: Relative Wealth Index point estimates and WorldPop 2025 constrained 1km total population raster

description: Total non-residential capital stock within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of non-residential capital stock raster

description: Total residential capital stock within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of residential capital stock raster

description: Total infrastructure capital stock within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of infrastructure capital stock raster

description: Motorway road network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of road lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed by road asset type

description: Primary road network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of road lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed by road asset type

description: Secondary road network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of road lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed by road asset type

description: Tertiary road network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of road lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed by road asset type

description: Trunk road network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of road lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed by road asset type

description: Rail network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of rail lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed

description: Power transmission network length within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Length of power transmission lines clipped to administrative boundaries and summed

description: Total mangrove restoration opportunity area within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in mangrove restoration classes 1 to 3; nearby cells outside admin polygons are assigned to the nearest admin within the coastal distance cap

description: Mangrove restoration opportunity area on accreting or expanding shorelines within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in mangrove restoration class 1; nearby cells outside admin polygons are assigned to the nearest admin within the coastal distance cap

description: Mangrove restoration opportunity area on static to moderately retreating shorelines within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in mangrove restoration class 2; nearby cells outside admin polygons are assigned to the nearest admin within the coastal distance cap

description: Mangrove restoration opportunity area on fast retreating shorelines within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in mangrove restoration class 3; nearby cells outside admin polygons are assigned to the nearest admin within the coastal distance cap

description: Total woodland restoration opportunity area for landslide risk within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in woodland landslide classes 1 to 3
source_notes: Global woodland landslide NbS opportunity raster

description: Woodland restoration opportunity area for landslide risk in other land cover within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in woodland landslide class 1
source_notes: Global woodland landslide NbS opportunity raster

description: Woodland restoration opportunity area for landslide risk in cropland within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in woodland landslide class 2
source_notes: Global woodland landslide NbS opportunity raster

description: Woodland restoration opportunity area for landslide risk on bare ground within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of raster cells in woodland landslide class 3
source_notes: Global woodland landslide NbS opportunity raster

description: Woodland restoration opportunity area for inland flood risk within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Area of binary woodland flood opportunity raster cells equal to 1
source_notes: Global woodland inland flood NbS opportunity raster

description: Total expected annual damage to road assets within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Line-level EAD apportioned to administrative regions by intersected line length and summed
source_notes: Selected flooding road damage GeoPackage model_run in infrastructure notebook

description: Expected annual damage to road assets within the administrative region by road asset type
aggregation_method: Line-level EAD apportioned to administrative regions by intersected line length and summed by asset_type
source_notes: Selected flooding road damage GeoPackage model_run in infrastructure notebook

description: Total expected annual damage to rail assets within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Line-level EAD apportioned to administrative regions by intersected line length and summed
source_notes: Selected flooding rail damage GeoPackage model_run in infrastructure notebook

description: Total baseline expected annual damage to power network assets within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Line-level EAD apportioned to administrative regions by intersected line length and summed
source_notes: STORM tropical cyclone power damage GeoPackage baseline model_run in infrastructure notebook

description: Expected annual flooded population within the administrative region by demographic or wealth group
aggregation_method: GeoPackage attribute rows filtered to risk_map=AAR and pivoted by population_group
source_notes: JRC population risk metrics GeoPackage in socioeconomic flooding notebook

description: Expected annual flooded share of the demographic or wealth group population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: GeoPackage attribute rows filtered to risk_map=AAR and pivoted by population_group
source_notes: JRC population risk metrics GeoPackage in socioeconomic flooding notebook

description: Protected expected annual flooded population within the administrative region by demographic or wealth group
aggregation_method: GeoPackage attribute rows filtered to risk_map=AAR_protected and pivoted by population_group
source_notes: JRC population risk metrics GeoPackage in socioeconomic flooding notebook

description: Protected expected annual flooded share of the demographic or wealth group population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: GeoPackage attribute rows filtered to risk_map=AAR_protected and pivoted by population_group
source_notes: JRC population risk metrics GeoPackage in socioeconomic flooding notebook
